plugin.name: postgres
plugin.description: PostgreSQL database operations: queries, DDL, schema inspection, connection pooling

conventions.name: query
conventions.description: Execute SELECT query, return rows as list of maps

conventions.name: query_one
conventions.description: Execute query returning a single row or null

conventions.name: create_table
conventions.description: Create a new table with specified columns

conventions.name: list_tables
conventions.description: List all tables in the database

conventions.name: table_schema
conventions.description: Get column information for a table
